title: Gun Game style
body:
My Gun Game mini-game has its own set of textures, and therefore it appeared in a free download for everyone.

This set of textures contains only interface changes. 

When used on version 1.20 and above, an error may occur in the main menu.

More information about GunGame can be found on my discord server. He is Russian-speaking, but you can still ask a question in English and I will answer you.
